narrative:
Cheviot 4-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,557 registered voters, with 63.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.7 percentage points.
